text.title: Figma AI Ecosystem Map Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the figma-ai-ecosystem methodology.

example.title: Q2 2026 Figma AI ecosystem report
example.narrative: Three first-party surfaces (Make beta, AI search GA, code-connect GA). Two plugins adopted (Stark, design-token-diff). Risk: Figma Make data flow not covered by current AI policy → blocked pending compliance review. Watchlist: Figma Slides AI rumored Q3.
example.artifact: ecosystem-report.md with surface matrix + risk highlights + recommendations.
